prompt: Two Circles Merge Into Square. White background (#FFFFFF). Canvas 1920x1080. Two circles (diameter 120px each): circle A red (#E53935) positioned at middle-left (200px left of center), circle B blue (#2196F3) positioned at middle-right (200px right of center). Animation (8s): 0-1s: Both circles fade in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 1-3s: Both circles move toward canvas center using ease-in-out, arriving at the same position and overlapping. 3-4s: Both circles scale down from 100% to 0% while a purple (#7B1FA2) square (size 140px) scales up from 0% to 100% at center, creating a merge-transform effect. 4-6s: Square holds at center. 6-7s: Square rotates 45 degrees with ease-in-out. 7-8s: Hold final state. Total duration: 8s.

Rocket Launch. Dark space background (#0F0F23). Canvas 1920x1080. A white rocket asset (120px) starts at bottom-center. An orange fire asset (60px, color #FF6B35) positioned directly below the rocket. Animation (6s): 0-0.5s: Both rocket and fire assets fade in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 0.5-4s: Rocket moves upward from bottom-center toward off-screen-top with ease-in acceleration. Fire asset trails below the rocket following the same upward path. 4-5s: Both assets fade out from opacity 1 to 0. 5-6s: Hold dark background. Total duration: 6s.

Two-Segment Pie Chart. White background (#FFFFFF). Canvas 1920x1080. A pie chart (300px diameter) centered on canvas. Two segments: blue (#2196F3) representing 60% (216 degrees), green (#4CAF50) representing 40% (144 degrees). Segments sum to 100%. Animation (6s): 0-3s: Pie sweeps radially from 0 degrees to 360 degrees with ease-out. Blue segment fills first from 0 to 216 degrees, then green segment fills from 216 to 360 degrees. 3-6s: Hold complete pie chart. Total duration: 6s.

Bouncing Red Circle. White background (#FFFFFF). Canvas 1920x1080. A red circle (#E53935, diameter 120px) starts at middle-left. Animation (6s): 0-0.5s: Circle fades in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 0.5-5s: Circle moves horizontally from middle-left to middle-right with bounce easing, bouncing three times with decreasing arc heights (200px, 120px, 60px above the center line). 5-6s: Hold final position at middle-right. Total duration: 6s.

Loading Progress Bar. Light neutral background (#F5F5F5). Canvas 1920x1080. A horizontal rectangle strip (600px wide, 40px tall, rounded corners 20px) centered on canvas with light grey base color (#E0E0E0). A green (#4CAF50) fill rectangle inside the strip starts at 0px width. Text '0%' (24px bold Arial, dark grey #333333) centered above the bar. Animation (8s): 0-1s: Base bar and text fade in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 1-6s: Green fill grows from 0px to 600px width from left to right with ease-in-out. Simultaneously the text counts from '0%' to '100%'. 6-7s: Text scales from 100% to 115% and back to 100% with ease-in-out as a completion pulse. 7-8s: Hold completed state. Total duration: 8s.

Triangle Pattern Formation. White background (#FFFFFF). Canvas 1920x1080. Three circles (diameter 120px each): red (#E53935), blue (#2196F3), and green (#4CAF50). Initial positions: red circle at bottom-left, blue circle at bottom-right, green circle at top-center. Animation (8s): 0-1s: All circles fade in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 1-3s: Red circle moves to middle-left, blue circle moves to middle-right, green circle remains at top-center, forming a triangle pattern with ease-in-out. 3-6s: Hold triangle pattern. 6-7s: All circles scale up by 20% and back to original size with ease-in-out. 7-8s: Hold final state. Total duration: 8s.

Car Drives Across Screen. White background (#FFFFFF). Canvas 1920x1080. A blue car asset (120px, color #2196F3) starts at off-screen-left. Animation (6s): 0-0.5s: Car fades in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 0.5-5s: Car moves horizontally from off-screen-left to off-screen-right across the center line with ease-in-out. 5-6s: Hold final position off-screen-right. Total duration: 6s.

Quarterly Sales Bar Chart. White background (#FFFFFF). Canvas 1920x1080. A bar chart with four vertical bars representing Q1, Q2, Q3, and Q4 sales data, centered on canvas. Bars are evenly spaced with 100px width each. Colors: Q1 red (#E53935), Q2 blue (#2196F3), Q3 green (#4CAF50), Q4 yellow (#FDD835). Heights: Q1 300px, Q2 450px, Q3 400px, Q4 350px. Labels 'Q1', 'Q2', 'Q3', 'Q4' (24px Arial, black #000000) below each bar. Animation (8s): 0-1s: Bars and labels fade in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 1-5s: Bars grow vertically from 0px to their respective heights with ease-in-out. 5-7s: Hold final bar heights. 7-8s: Bars and labels fade out from opacity 1 to 0 with ease-in. Total duration: 8s.

Typing Text Animation. White background (#FFFFFF). Canvas 1920x1080. Text 'Hello World!' (48px Arial bold, black #000000) starts at center. Animation (6s): 0-0.5s: Text cursor blinks at start position with ease-out. 0.5-5s: Text types out letter by letter from left to right with ease-in-out, each letter appearing sequentially. 5-6s: Hold complete text. Total duration: 6s.

Sunset and Moonrise. Dark space background (#1A1A2E). Canvas 1920x1080. A yellow sun asset (120px, color #FDD835) starts at top-center. A white moon asset (120px) starts at off-screen-bottom. Animation (8s): 0-0.5s: Sun fades in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 0.5-3s: Sun moves downward from top-center to off-screen-bottom with ease-in-out. 3-4s: Sun fades out from opacity 1 to 0. 4-4.5s: Moon fades in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 4.5-7s: Moon moves upward from off-screen-bottom to top-center with ease-in-out. 7-8s: Hold final position of moon at top-center. Total duration: 8s.

Two Triangles Merge Into Diamond. White background (#FFFFFF). Canvas 1920x1080. Two triangles (140px base, 140px tall each): triangle A red (#E53935) positioned at middle-left (200px left of center), triangle B blue (#2196F3) positioned at middle-right (200px right of center). Animation (8s): 0-1s: Both triangles fade in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 1-3s: Both triangles move toward canvas center using ease-in-out, arriving at the same position and overlapping. 3-4s: Both triangles scale down from 100% to 0% while a purple (#7B1FA2) diamond shape (size 140px wide, 140px tall) scales up from 0% to 100% at center, creating a merge-transform effect. 4-6s: Diamond holds at center. 6-7s: Diamond rotates 45 degrees with ease-in-out. 7-8s: Hold final state. Total duration: 8s.

Three Squares Stack and Fall. White background (#FFFFFF). Canvas 1920x1080. Three squares (each 120px, red #E53935, blue #2196F3, green #4CAF50) start spread out horizontally at bottom-center. Animation (8s): 0-1s: Squares fade in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 1-3s: Squares move vertically to stack at center with ease-in-out, red at bottom, blue in middle, green on top. 3-5s: Hold stacked position. 5-7s: Squares fall sequentially from top to bottom with bounce easing, each square bouncing twice before settling at bottom-center. 7-8s: Hold final fallen state. Total duration: 8s.

Step-by-Step Timeline with Check Marks. Light neutral background (#F5F5F5). Canvas 1920x1080. A horizontal timeline with five evenly spaced circles (diameter 60px) centered horizontally on canvas. Each circle is grey (#9E9E9E) initially. A green checkmark asset (size 40px) appears inside each circle. Animation (10s): 0-1s: Timeline fades in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 1-2s: First circle fills with green (#4CAF50) and checkmark appears with ease-in. 2-3s: Second circle fills with green and checkmark appears with ease-in. 3-4s: Third circle fills with green and checkmark appears with ease-in. 4-5s: Fourth circle fills with green and checkmark appears with ease-in. 5-6s: Fifth circle fills with green and checkmark appears with ease-in. 6-8s: Hold completed timeline. 8-10s: Entire timeline scales up slightly (110%) and back to original size with ease-in-out as a completion pulse. Total duration: 10s.

Cloud and Rain Animation. Light neutral background (#F5F5F5). Canvas 1920x1080. A cloud asset (120px) positioned at top-center. Multiple blue raindrop assets (each 20px, color #2196F3) start above the cloud. Animation (8s): 0-1s: Cloud fades in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 1-3s: Raindrops appear and fall from above the cloud to bottom-center with ease-in-out, spreading out slightly as they fall. 3-6s: Continuous rain effect with raindrops falling in a loop. 6-7s: Raindrops fade out from opacity 1 to 0. 7-8s: Hold final state with cloud. Total duration: 8s.

Notification Bell Vibration. Light neutral background (#F5F5F5). Canvas 1920x1080. A bell asset (120px, color #FF9800) positioned at center. Animation (6s): 0-0.5s: Bell fades in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 0.5-4s: Bell vibrates with a rapid left-right motion (10px each side) using ease-in-out, simulating a ringing effect. 4-5s: Bell fades out from opacity 1 to 0. 5-6s: Hold background. Total duration: 6s.

Statistic Cards Display. Light neutral background (#F5F5F5). Canvas 1920x1080. Three statistic cards (each 300px wide, 200px tall, rounded corners 10px) positioned side by side, centered horizontally. Card 1: 'Revenue' title (24px bold Arial, dark grey #333333) with number '$0' (48px bold Arial, green #4CAF50) below. Card 2: 'Users' title (24px bold Arial, dark grey #333333) with number '0' (48px bold Arial, blue #2196F3) below. Card 3: 'Growth' title (24px bold Arial, dark grey #333333) with number '0%' (48px bold Arial, orange #FF9800) below. Animation (8s): 0-1s: All cards fade in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 1-6s: Numbers on each card count up smoothly: Revenue from '$0' to '$10,000', Users from '0' to '5,000', Growth from '0%' to '20%' with ease-in-out. 6-8s: Hold final numbers. Total duration: 8s.

Loading Spinner to Check Mark. Light neutral background (#F5F5F5). Canvas 1920x1080. A circular loading spinner (diameter 120px, color #2196F3) centered on canvas. A green check mark asset (120px, color #4CAF50) positioned at center. Animation (8s): 0-1s: Spinner fades in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 1-5s: Spinner rotates clockwise continuously with linear easing. 5-6s: Spinner scales down to 0% while the check mark scales up from 0% to 100% at center with ease-in-out, creating a transformation effect. 6-7s: Check mark holds at center. 7-8s: Check mark fades out from opacity 1 to 0. Total duration: 8s.

Product Rating Graphic. Light neutral background (#F5F5F5). Canvas 1920x1080. Five star icons (each 60px, color #E0E0E0) aligned horizontally at center, spaced 40px apart. A text element 'Rating: 0/5' (48px Arial bold, dark grey #333333) positioned to the right of the stars. Animation (8s): 0-1s: Stars and text fade in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 1-6s: Stars fill one by one from left to right, changing from grey to yellow (#FDD835) with ease-in-out, each star filling over 1s. Simultaneously, the text updates to 'Rating: 1/5', 'Rating: 2/5', etc., with each star fill. 6-7s: Text scales from 100% to 115% and back to 100% with ease-in-out as a completion pulse. 7-8s: Hold completed state with all stars filled and text 'Rating: 5/5'. Total duration: 8s.

Monthly Growth Line Chart. White background (#FFFFFF). Canvas 1920x1080. A line chart with a horizontal axis labeled 'Months' and a vertical axis labeled 'Growth' spans the width of the canvas. The line chart starts at the bottom-left and progresses to the top-right, representing monthly growth. A glowing dot (20px diameter, cyan #00ACC1) travels along the line. Animation (8s): 0-1s: Axes and labels fade in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 1-5s: Line draws from left to right with ease-in-out, showing monthly growth. Simultaneously, the glowing dot follows the line's path, maintaining its position on the line. 5-6s: Glowing dot pulses by scaling from 100% to 120% and back to 100% with ease-in-out. 6-8s: Hold final state with complete line and glowing dot at the end of the line. Total duration: 8s.

Success Achievement with Trophy and Stars. White background (#FFFFFF). Canvas 1920x1080. A trophy asset (120px, gold color #FFD700) positioned at center. Five star icons (60px each, yellow #FDD835) surrounding the trophy in a circular arrangement at a 200px radius. Animation (8s): 0-1s: Trophy fades in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 1-3s: Stars fade in sequentially in a clockwise order with ease-out. 3-6s: Stars rotate around the trophy in a clockwise direction with ease-in-out. 6-7s: Stars scale up to 120% and back to 100% creating a pulsing effect with ease-in-out. 7-8s: Hold final state. Total duration: 8s.

Cloud Processing Animation. Light neutral background (#F5F5F5). Canvas 1920x1080. A cloud asset (120px) positioned at top-center. A lightning asset (120px) positioned off-screen-top. Multiple blue lines (width 10px, length 300px, color #2196F3) representing data flow, positioned at middle-center, initially off-screen-top. Animation (10s): 0-1s: Cloud asset fades in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 1-2s: Lightning asset moves from off-screen-top to the cloud with ease-in-out and strikes it. 2-3s: Lightning asset fades out from opacity 1 to 0. 3-4s: Blue lines appear from the cloud and flow downward to middle-center with ease-in, representing data processing. 4-9s: Blue lines continue flowing downward in a loop, simulating fast processing. 9-10s: Hold final state. Total duration: 10s.

System Automation Gears. White background (#FFFFFF). Canvas 1920x1080. A central gear icon (asset, 120px, grey #9E9E9E) positioned at center. Four smaller gear icons (asset, 60px each, colors: red #E53935, blue #2196F3, green #4CAF50, yellow #FDD835) surrounding the central gear at 200px radius. Animation (8s): 0-1s: Central gear fades in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 1-3s: Central gear rotates clockwise continuously with linear easing. 3-5s: Smaller gears fade in sequentially around the central gear, one per 0.5s, with ease-out. 5-7s: All gears rotate in sync with the central gear, maintaining their positions. 7-8s: Hold final state. Total duration: 8s.

User Growth and Expansion. White background (#FFFFFF). Canvas 1920x1080. A user icon asset (120px, color #E53935) positioned at center. Multiple arrow-right icons (60px each, color #2196F3) initially positioned at center, overlapping the user icon. Animation (8s): 0-1s: User icon fades in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 1-3s: Arrow-right icons appear and move outward from the center to positions surrounding the user icon at a 200px radius with ease-in-out, representing expansion. 3-7s: Arrow-right icons continue to move outward slightly, creating a subtle growth effect. 7-8s: Hold final expanded state. Total duration: 8s.

Day to Night Transition. Canvas 1920x1080. Background starts bright blue (#87CEEB) and transitions to deep dark blue (#1A1A2E) and then almost black (#0F0F23). A sun asset (120px, yellow #FDD835) starts near bottom-left horizon and moves in a smooth circular arc across the sky, setting near bottom-right horizon. A moon asset (120px, white #FFFFFF) rises from bottom-left horizon following a similar arc path, moving toward upper-right area of the sky, emitting a soft glow. Several cloud assets (white #FFFFFF, 200px wide each) drift across the sky from left to right. Small star assets (white #FFFFFF, 10px each) appear gradually across the sky, distributed unevenly, twinkling softly in a continuous loop. A wide rectangle at the bottom represents grass, transitioning from bright green (#4CAF50) to very dark green (#013220). Animation (12s): 0-1s: Scene fades in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 1-5s: Sun moves in an arc from bottom-left to bottom-right with ease-in-out; sky transitions from bright blue to deep dark blue. 5-6s: Sun disappears, moon rises from bottom-left following a similar arc path with ease-in-out; sky transitions to almost black. 6-10s: Moon holds position, emitting soft glow; stars appear and twinkle softly; clouds drift continuously. 10-12s: Grass transitions to very dark green. Total duration: 12s.

Day to Night Transition. Canvas 1920x1080. Background transitions from bright blue (#87CEEB) to deep dark blue (#1A1A2E) and finally almost black (#0F0F23). A sun asset (120px, yellow #FDD835) starts near off-screen-left and moves horizontally across the sky toward the right horizon. A moon asset (120px, white #FFFFFF) enters from off-screen-left after the sun sets and moves toward the right side of the sky, emitting a soft glow. Several cloud assets (white #FFFFFF, 200px wide) drift across the sky from left to right. Small star assets (white #FFFFFF, 20px) appear gradually and twinkle softly. A wide rectangle at the bottom represents grass, transitioning from bright green (#4CAF50) to very dark green (#013220). Animation (12s): 0-1s: Sun fades in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 1-4s: Sun moves from left to right across the sky with ease-in-out. 4-5s: Sun fades out as it sets. 5-6s: Moon fades in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 6-9s: Moon moves from left to right across the sky with ease-in-out, emitting a soft glow. 9-10s: Stars appear gradually and twinkle softly in a continuous loop. 0-12s: Clouds drift from left to right continuously. Grass color transitions from bright green to very dark green as the sky darkens. 10-12s: Hold final night scene with moon and stars. Total duration: 12s.

Day to Night Transition Scene. Dark to light gradient background transitioning from bright blue (#2196F3) to deep dark blue (#1A1A2E) to almost black (#0F0F23). Canvas 1920x1080. A yellow sun asset (120px, color #FDD835) starts near the upper-left. A white moon asset (120px, color #FFFFFF) starts off-screen-top. Several white cloud assets (120px each, color #FFFFFF) distributed unevenly across the sky. A wide horizontal rectangle (1920px wide, 100px tall) at bottom represents grass, transitioning from bright green (#4CAF50) to very dark green (#1B5E20). Animation (12s): 0-1s: Sun fades in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 1-5s: Sun travels along a smooth circular arc path from upper-left to bottom-right with ease-in-out, sky transitions from bright blue to deep dark blue. 5-6s: Sun fades out as it sets. 6-7s: Moon fades in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 7-11s: Moon travels along a similar arc path from upper-left to bottom-right, sky transitions to almost black. Clouds drift slowly from left to right throughout with linear easing. 8-10s: Stars appear gradually and twinkle softly with a continuous looping glow. 11-12s: Hold final night scene with moon and stars visible. Total duration: 12s.

Heart Outline and Pulse. White background (#FFFFFF). Canvas 1920x1080. A heart shape outline (red #E53935, stroke width 5px) centered on canvas. Animation (10s): 0-1s: Heart outline draws itself from top-center to complete shape with ease-out. 1-2s: Heart fills with red color (#E53935) from top to bottom with ease-in. 2-8s: Heart beats with rhythmic pulsing motion, scaling from 100% to 110% and back to 100% in a smooth cycle every 1s with ease-in-out. 8-10s: Hold final pulsing state. Total duration: 10s.

Lightbulb Icon with Glowing Effect. White background (#FFFFFF). Canvas 1920x1080. A lightbulb asset (120px) centered on canvas. Animation (8s): 0-1s: Lightbulb outline begins drawing from the bottom to the top with ease-in-out, using animated strokes. 1-4s: Drawing continues until the entire lightbulb outline is complete. 4-5s: A glowing light effect (yellow #FDD835) appears inside the bulb with ease-out, simulating a light turning on. 5-7s: Glow pulsates slightly, expanding and contracting by 10% with ease-in-out. 7-8s: Hold final glowing state. Total duration: 8s.
